description: Scan-only subset of the AI Review golden dataset. Each entry pins a scan-type failure mode + expected recovery envelope. Consumed by apps/web/src/lib/ai/__tests__/golden-scan-subset.eval.test.ts and by the upcoming vision-fallback-gate regression runs. Binary PDFs live next to the main manifest (`Test AI/…`) and are typically NOT git-tracked.
notes: `status: live` = expectation JSON exists + fixture file present + live pipeline expected to run.
`status: pending_fixture` = anchor listed for roadmap alignment, but fixture PDF is NOT yet in `Test AI/`. Live eval skips these with a warning.
Never add a new live entry without shipping its expectation file in scan-expectations/.

entries.corpusNote: Primary scan anchor case. Scan PDF with garbled text layer; bundle includes commission contract + AML/FATCA annex + health-style questionnaire. Coverage signal for vision-primary path and AML/FATCA split.
Placeholder — needs a scan variant of a life insurance final contract with only a garbled text layer. Track down a real advisor scan before flipping status=live.
Placeholder for a phone-photo DPS scan with skew / low contrast. Blocks evaluation of photo-grade inputs until a real fixture is captured.
Placeholder — multi-page DPS with empty AcroForm layer + scanned overlay.
Placeholder — rotated-page scan, tests rasterize + vision orientation handling.
